title: Distant horizon + shaders
description:
Distant horizon + shaders 1.21.3.

Includes distant Horizons 1.21.3 with a couple of my fav shaders, and compatible client-side vanilla-friendly mods.
body: This modpack contains version 1.21.3 of Distant Horizons. It also contains shaders, and vanilla friendly client side mods to make the game look a bit nicer. Mostly every mod is customizable and can be disabled if desired. This version of DH may be unstable, since it is in beta, please use at your own risk.
